_doc: Codex marketplace catalog for Hirey Hi. Per the official Codex plugin-creator spec (~/.codex/skills/.system/plugin-creator/references/plugin-json-spec.md), this file MUST live at <repo-root>/.agents/plugins/marketplace.json and each entry's `source.path` is resolved RELATIVE to this marketplace.json — `./plugins/<name>` therefore points at <repo-root>/.agents/plugins/plugins/<name>/. Codex finds this file when a user runs `codex plugin marketplace add hirey-ai/hirey-codex-plugin`.
name: hirey
